description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a striking red and black color scheme. The handguard, receiver, and magazine well are finished in a vivid red, likely a custom or camo pattern, while the stock, pistol grip, and magazine are matte black. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock for adjustable length of pull, and a detachable box magazine is inserted into the magwell. The barrel is relatively short, ending in a flash hider, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights. The overall build suggests a modern, urban tactical firearm, suitable for close to mid-range engagements.
description: A modern, compact rifle with a red and black finish, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, red handguard, receiver, and black collapsible stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the black stock and pistol grip, with the magazine and handguard visible in profile.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
